# GetACoffeeInput

> **Service Layer**

```ts
const GetACoffeeInput: Struct<{
  name: typeof String$;
}>;
```

Defined in: [src/app/service/coffee/module/get-a-coffee/get-a-coffee.schema.ts:40](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/service/coffee/module/get-a-coffee/get-a-coffee.schema.ts#L40)

Effect Schema for validating `get-a-coffee` tool input.

## Remarks

Contains a single `name` field (string) identifying the coffee to
retrieve.  This schema is the single source-of-truth from which
[GetACoffeeInputJsonSchema](GetACoffeeInputJsonSchema.md) and
[GetACoffeeInputStandard](GetACoffeeInputStandard.md) are derived.

## Example

```ts
import { Schema } from "effect";
import { GetACoffeeInput } from "./get-a-coffee.schema.js";

const decoded = Schema.decodeUnknownSync(GetACoffeeInput)({
  name: "Espresso",
});
// decoded: { name: "Espresso" }
```
